headline: BHP Hikes Jansen Stage 2 Project Investment After Detailed Review
summary: BHP Group raises Jansen Stage 2 investment to $6.9B after a detailed review, with first production expected in late FY31.

headline: CRH Adds Former CF Industries CEO to Its Board; Why Investors Are Paying Attention
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 1.94%, CRH plc (NYSE:CRH) is among the 7 Best Building Materials Stocks to Buy for the Residential Recovery. On June 16, CRH plc (NYSE:CRH) announced the election of Tony Will to its Board of Directors, effective July 1, 2026. Will previously served as President, Chief Executive Officer, and board […]
